name: Panfrost — The Mesa 3D Graphics Library latest documentation
snippet: PanVK, the Vulkan implementation in the Panfrost driver stack, is currently conformant on Mali-G610, but non-conformant on other GPUs.

name: Arm Preparing Support For Latest Mali GPUs With Panthor Open
snippet: Public Collabora has made further progress on #Panfrost open-source Mali #GPU driver and they can now run GNOME 3 and some 3D games on #Arm ...

name: Opengles tagged News - The Khronos Group
snippet: Panfrost driver combination are now officially conformant for OpenGL ES 3.1 on Mali-G610. Panfrost is an open source driver for Arm Mali GPUs

name: Panfrost: OpenGL ES 3.1 conformance achieved on Mali-G610 GPU
snippet: The fully open source Panthor kernel driver and Mesa Panfrost driver combination has achieved official conformance for OpenGL ES 3.1 on the Mali-G610.

name: Mali and OpenCL - General Discussion - DietPi Community Forum
snippet: Hello dido, you can go two possible routes: The proprietary ARM OpenCL blobs, or the open-source path via Panfrost + Mesa OpenCL.

name: A helping Arm for Panfrost - Collabora
snippet: Panfrost means that you'll have conformant and performant out-of-the-box open-source support for any system you buy with an Arm Mali SoC.

name: Has anyone tried genuine Mali drivers? - MNT Community
snippet: Meanwhile the open source mesa/panvk is already at Vulkan 1.3… ARM is actively supporting the panthor/panvk driver, see Release the panthor!

name: Arm Mali G1 Pro Now Working With Open-Source PanVK & Panfrost
snippet: The PanVK Vulkan driver and Panfrost Gallium3D driver for Arm Mali graphics hardware is now supporting the latest "v14" hardware GPU ...
